Embark on a transformative journey through exquisite waterfront Living!

Where architectural majesty converges with serene waves. A private enclave tailored for the design connoisseur, situated in the heart of Dubai's most pristine waterways.

Uncompromising Standard

A sanctuary crafted with infinite care.

Arbor Residences blends the organic textures of stone and timber with state-of-the-art engineering. Nestled directly alongside serene flowing waters, every sunrise becomes an exclusive visual masterpiece.

360°

Waterfront Views

24

Limited Residences

Private Marina Access

Direct boardwalk access with private berths curated for personal luxury vessels.

Sustainable Sanctuary

LEED-certified architectural framework incorporating lush bio-walls and thermal insulation.

Sky Butler & Concierge

Impeccable 24/7 bespoke living assistance responding to every meticulous request.

Infinite Pool Deck

Suspended leisure deck with glass-bottom design offering surreal panoramic skylines.

Curated Layouts

Designed for visual balance, high utility, and an exquisite sense of flow. Select your desired living standard below.

Collection Tier A

03 BR Signature Waterfront Apartments

An immaculate fusion of luxury space and pristine waterfront vistas. Features bespoke modern kitchens, open terrace lounges, and double-glazed soundproof glass walls.

Views Panoramic Marina & Canal

Resort-Style Amenities

Curated experiences,
limitless convenience.

Step out of your private elevator directly into a sanctuary of wellness, dining, and premium lifestyle services managed by world-class concierges.

Wellness

L'Oasis Wellness Spa

Thermal pools, salt rooms, and professional therapists offering curated holistic sensory rituals.

Leisure

Sommelier's Lounge

Temperature-controlled cellars and luxury lounges hosting masterclass events for estate residents.

Gastronomy

Chef's Atelier

An exclusive, high-concept test kitchen bookable for bespoke private catering and culinary displays.

Perfect Connection

Perfectly Positioned

Located along the pristine water banks of Dubai, Arbor Residences perfectly isolates you from urban noise while guaranteeing that major business districts and luxury lifestyle hubs are only minutes away.

Instantly step outside your private residence into a luxury marina strip containing award-winning bistros, yacht docks, and quiet seaside walking pathways.

Effortless accessibility to primary corporate towers, exquisite luxury retail landmarks, and fine dining hotspots.

Fast transit pathways ensuring seamless travel coordination, returning to your safe oasis with ease.

Arbor Residences
International Hub
Yacht Club
Dubai Waterfront Enclave

"Arbor Residences represents a masterclass in organic architecture. The way the dynamic diagonal lines frame the natural light makes it feel more like a living sculpture than an elite apartment complex."

Sir Alistair Sterling

Architectural Digest Contributor & Patron

Secure Your Sanctuary

Schedule a Private Viewing

Given our extremely limited collection of 24 waterfront estates, viewings are conducted purely through certified invitation. Complete the form to establish communications with your personal relations agent.

private@arborresidences.ae

By clicking submit, you authorize Arbor Residences to verify and share your details with our exclusive partner brokers to coordinate customized hospitality logistics.

Invitation Received

Thank you. A senior relations coordinator will contact you directly within 2 hours to verify your credentials and arrange luxury transport for your tour.
